column55: 1.Conducting Nutrition Assessments. ndo Sub County Hospital, Awendo, Kenya • Coaching individuals on methods of managing chronic diseases with effective dietary plans • Informing corporate clientele about the value of healthy eating habits for improved productivity levels within their workforce • Designing engaging educational materials on various aspects of nutrition, enhancing client understanding and retention of key concepts • Educating clients about long-term health benefits of balanced diets and exercise programs • Increasing client adherence to dietary recommendations through motivational interviewing techniques and ongoing support • Counseling clients on nutrition issues such as obesity, eating disorders, tube feeding management, failure to thrive and feeding dysfunction. • Crafted policies governing facilities' nutritional programs, facilitating provision of standardized care and support to healthcare users. • Assessed individuals to determine nutrition requirements and recommended individualized care plans.
